_publications._publicationTitle: Canonical Wnt/β-catenin signaling drives human schwann cell transformation, progression, and tumor maintenance.

_contextSnippet: percentage of CCND1 positive tumors and found that it also increased in the higher grade tumors (67.6% dNF, 64.7% pNF, 94.1% MPNST, p=0.0051 Fisher's Exact Test)
details: Detected CCND1 expression with increasing positivity rates: 67.6% dNF, 64.7% pNF, 94.1% MPNST (p=0.0051)
